## Validation

- [ ] `dotnet restore .\Arcade.sln`
- [ ] `dotnet build .\Arcade.sln -v minimal`
- [ ] `dotnet test .\Arcade.sln -v minimal`

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and avoids unrelated refactors
- [ ] No keyboard-dependent gameplay controls were added
- [ ] Data or metadata changes were validated (`repo.json`, `dist/Arcade.zip`) when applicable
- [ ] Documentation updated if user-facing behavior changed
